name: credmesh-solana-bridge
description: EVM ⇒ Solana attestation bridge. Reads EVM ReputationRegistry / ReputationCreditOracle / IdentityRegistry; signs short-TTL ed25519 credit attestations consumed by Solana credmesh-escrow's request_advance. Tails Solana AdvanceIssued/AdvanceSettled/AdvanceLiquidated events back to the EVM credit-worker for AgentRecord updates.
